tts: Long ago, there was no money at all. Tap the cards to travel through time! Long ago, people swapped things. A chicken for some corn! But swapping was tricky. What if nobody wanted your chicken? So people invented money — something everyone agrees is worth trading.
text: Long ago, there was no money at all. Tap the cards to travel through time! Long ago, people swapped things. A chicken for some corn! But swapping was tricky. What if nobody wanted your chicken? So people invented money — something everyone agrees is worth trading.

tts: Would you rather be paid for chores in CHICKENS or COINS?
text: Would you rather be paid for chores in CHICKENS or COINS?

tts: You learned: Before money, people swapped things. Money makes trading easy for everyone. Money keeps changing — even into numbers on a screen!
text: You learned: Before money, people swapped things. Money makes trading easy for everyone. Money keeps changing — even into numbers on a screen!

tts: A NEED keeps you healthy and safe. A WANT is fun but you can live without it. Can you sort them? NEEDS are things we must have to live — food, water, a home. WANTS are fun extras — games, candy, toys. Smart savers pay for needs first, then save for wants!
text: A NEED keeps you healthy and safe. A WANT is fun but you can live without it. Can you sort them? NEEDS are things we must have to live — food, water, a home. WANTS are fun extras — games, candy, toys. Smart savers pay for needs first, then save for wants!

tts: Think about YOUR life. Which one is a real NEED?
text: Think about YOUR life. Which one is a real NEED?

tts: You learned: Needs come first: food, water, home. Wants are extras we can wait for. Needs first, wants second — that is the money champion rule!
text: You learned: Needs come first: food, water, home. Wants are extras we can wait for. Needs first, wants second — that is the money champion rule!

tts: Money does not fall from the sky — people EARN it by helping and working. Try some jobs! Grown-ups earn money by doing jobs that help people. Kids can earn too — chores, dog walking, watering plants! The rule is simple: work first, money after.
text: Money does not fall from the sky — people EARN it by helping and working. Try some jobs! Grown-ups earn money by doing jobs that help people. Kids can earn too — chores, dog walking, watering plants! The rule is simple: work first, money after.

tts: Which job could YOU really do at home this week to earn?
text: Which job could YOU really do at home this week to earn?

tts: You learned: Money is earned by working and helping. Even small jobs add up to real money. What you earn is yours to save, spend, or share!
text: You learned: Money is earned by working and helping. Even small jobs add up to real money. What you earn is yours to save, spend, or share!

tts: When money arrives, split it into 3 jars: green to SAVE, blue to SPEND, yellow to SHARE. You choose how! The green SAVE jar grows your money for big dreams. The blue SPEND jar is for things you buy now. The yellow SHARE jar helps other people and animals.
text: When money arrives, split it into 3 jars: green to SAVE, blue to SPEND, yellow to SHARE. You choose how! The green SAVE jar grows your money for big dreams. The blue SPEND jar is for things you buy now. The yellow SHARE jar helps other people and animals.

tts: What would YOU fill your green SAVE jar for?
text: What would YOU fill your green SAVE jar for?

tts: You learned: Save some — future you says thanks! Spend some — enjoy what you earned. Share some — giving feels great.
text: You learned: Save some — future you says thanks! Spend some — enjoy what you earned. Share some — giving feels great.

tts: A budget is a PLAN for your money before you spend it. You have $10 — plan every dollar! A budget is like a map — it tells your money where to go. Start with what you have. Today: 10 dollars. Give every dollar a job before you spend it!
text: A budget is a PLAN for your money before you spend it. You have $10 — plan every dollar! A budget is like a map — it tells your money where to go. Start with what you have. Today: 10 dollars. Give every dollar a job before you spend it!

tts: When your $10 was running low, what is smartest to protect?
text: When your $10 was running low, what is smartest to protect?

tts: You learned: A budget is a plan for your money. Every dollar gets a job. A good plan always includes some saving.
text: You learned: A budget is a plan for your money. Every dollar gets a job. A good plan always includes some saving.

tts: A bank is a super-safe piggy bank. It even pays you a little extra — called INTEREST — for keeping money there. Watch it grow! A bank keeps your money safe — safer than under your bed! Banks add a little extra to your savings. That gift is called interest. Saved money is like a seed. Leave it alone and it grows!
text: A bank is a super-safe piggy bank. It even pays you a little extra — called INTEREST — for keeping money there. Watch it grow! A bank keeps your money safe — safer than under your bed! Banks add a little extra to your savings. That gift is called interest. Saved money is like a seed. Leave it alone and it grows!

tts: Your coins grow while you sleep. What would YOU do with 10 coins?
text: Your coins grow while you sleep. What would YOU do with 10 coins?

tts: You learned: Banks keep money safe. Interest is extra money the bank adds. The longer you save, the bigger it grows!
text: You learned: Banks keep money safe. Interest is extra money the bank adds. The longer you save, the bigger it grows!

tts: Big things cost more than one allowance. Pick a dream, save week by week, and watch yourself get there! See something big you want? That is a savings goal! Save a little every week instead of spending it all. Waiting is hard — but reaching your goal feels AMAZING.
text: Big things cost more than one allowance. Pick a dream, save week by week, and watch yourself get there! See something big you want? That is a savings goal! Save a little every week instead of spending it all. Waiting is hard — but reaching your goal feels AMAZING.

tts: What real thing would YOU save up for?
text: What real thing would YOU save up for?

tts: You learned: A goal gives your saving a purpose. Slow and steady saving wins. Patience pays — literally!
text: You learned: A goal gives your saving a purpose. Slow and steady saving wins. Patience pays — literally!

tts: You are the boss of a lemonade stand! Each cup costs you 20 cents to make. Pick a price and see what happens! Making things costs money. Lemons, water, cups: 20 cents per cup. You choose the price. Too high? Fewer people buy! Money in, minus costs = PROFIT. That is business!
text: You are the boss of a lemonade stand! Each cup costs you 20¢ to make. Pick a price and see what happens! Making things costs money. Lemons, water, cups: 20¢ per cup. You choose the price. Too high? Fewer people buy! Money in, minus costs = PROFIT. That is business!

tts: One price sold MORE cups; another earned more PER cup. Which is smarter?
text: One price sold MORE cups; another earned more PER cup. Which is smarter?

tts: You learned: Every business has costs. Price changes how many people buy. Profit = money in − costs.
text: You learned: Every business has costs. Price changes how many people buy. Profit = money in − costs.

tts: Money lives on screens now too! Flip each card and guess: smart move or danger zone? Money can be invisible — on cards, phones, and games. Passwords are secret keys. Real friends never need them. Golden rule: always ask a trusted grown-up before paying online.
text: Money lives on screens now too! Flip each card and guess: smart move or danger zone? Money can be invisible — on cards, phones, and games. Passwords are secret keys. Real friends never need them. Golden rule: always ask a trusted grown-up before paying online.

tts: A game says "Enter your password for FREE coins!" What do YOU do?
text: A game says "Enter your password for FREE coins!" What do YOU do?

tts: You learned: Keep passwords secret — always. Ask a grown-up before buying online. If it feels weird, stop and tell someone.
text: You learned: Keep passwords secret — always. Ask a grown-up before buying online. If it feels weird, stop and tell someone.

tts: Money. What we trade for things we need and want.
text: Money. What we trade for things we need and want.

tts: Earn. To get money by working or helping.
text: Earn. To get money by working or helping.

tts: Save. To keep money for later instead of spending now.
text: Save. To keep money for later instead of spending now.

tts: Spend. To use money to buy something.
text: Spend. To use money to buy something.

tts: Share. To give some money to help others.
text: Share. To give some money to help others.

tts: Need. Something you must have to live, like food.
text: Need. Something you must have to live, like food.

tts: Want. Something fun you can live without.
text: Want. Something fun you can live without.

tts: Budget. A plan that gives every dollar a job.
text: Budget. A plan that gives every dollar a job.

tts: Bank. A super-safe place that keeps your money.
text: Bank. A super-safe place that keeps your money.

tts: Interest. Extra money a bank adds to your savings.
text: Interest. Extra money a bank adds to your savings.

tts: Deposit. Putting money INTO the bank.
text: Deposit. Putting money INTO the bank.

tts: Withdraw. Taking money OUT of the bank.
text: Withdraw. Taking money OUT of the bank.

tts: Goal. Something big you save up for.
text: Goal. Something big you save up for.

tts: Profit. The money left after paying your costs.
text: Profit. The money left after paying your costs.

tts: Cost. What you must pay to make or get something.
text: Cost. What you must pay to make or get something.

tts: Allowance. Money you get regularly, like every week.
text: Allowance. Money you get regularly, like every week.

tts: Password. A secret key. Never share it with anyone!
text: Password. A secret key. Never share it with anyone!

tts: Hi there! Pick a spot on the map. Every game pays Penny Coins you can bank, grow, and spend in my shop!
text: Hi there! Pick a spot on the map. Every game pays Penny Coins you can bank, grow, and spend in my shop!
